'''βàöy-ng-z-zh''' ('''kayangzezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebeast|bebeast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bebeast|bebeast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöy-ng-z-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kayangzezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyangzezhoko|thiyangzezhoko]] || [[word:jiyangzezhoko|jiyangzezhoko]] || [[word:shiyangzezhoko|shiyangzezhoko]] || [[word:kiyangzezhoko|kiyangzezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
